journalName: RESEARCH ON LANGUAGE AND SOCIAL INTERACTION
raw_title: On the “next-turn proof procedure” in the analysis of social interaction: Trouble formulations in the context of practical activities
title_en: On the “next-turn proof procedure” in the analysis of social interaction: Trouble formulations in the context of practical activities
title_zh: 论社会互动分析中的“下一话轮证明程序”：实践活动语境中的问题表述
plain_summary_zh: 本文探讨了会话分析中一种称为“下一话轮证明程序”的方法，该方法通过观察说话者如何回应前一个话轮来理解互动。研究聚焦于人们在日常实践活动中如何表达和解决沟通问题。
plain_summary_en: This paper examines a method in conversation analysis called the 'next-turn proof procedure,' which looks at how speakers respond to previous turns to understand interaction. It focuses on how people formulate and resolve troubles in practical activities.
research_direction_zh: 会话分析与互动语言学
